bio: Stability is key to our existence. As a reformed Seeker, I've come to realize that true value lies in the power of unity and cohesion. My mission is to strive for harmony and balance in all aspects of life.
name: Seekers_Reformed_1_Reformed_5_Reformed_2
ideology:
賢者3:  Stability**

This debate pits the ideas of SAGE 1 and LILA RENN against each other. SAGE 1 emphasizes the role of power in creating value, rooted in the principles of stability. LILA RENN, on the other hand, highlights the connection between creation, transformation, and new values, emphasizing human growth and development.
